[{'text': "Good, I'm back in the white corridor at (11.13, 7.90). The map shows three horizontal corridors separated by black walls. I need to find a vertical passage (gap in the black walls) to move between corridors. 

Looking at the map image carefully, the black walls between corridors appear to be solid across the visible area. The passage might be on the far right side of the map (beyond the visible area) or on the left side. Let me think about the coordinates:
- Current position: (11.13, 7.87) - middle corridor
- Destination: (11.51, 13.67) - upper corridor

The destination Y is 13.67 and I'm at Y=7.87. The map seems to show the corridors at different Y levels. Let me try moving further right to find a passage, or check if there's a right-side opening.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01DP4SMH6XQ3N4y67H4SoKdY', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 0.5}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
